articles.title: Transfers or disclosures not authorised by Union law
Transfers on the basis of an adequacy decision
Principles relating to processing of personal data

cells: Adoption of the Guidelines for public consultation
Adoption of the Guidelines after public consultation

footnotes.text: References to "EU" and "Member States" made throughout this document should be understood as references to "EEA" and "EEA Member States" respectively.
Article 48 refers to "transfers or disclosures". Therefore, this will be the terminology used throughout the text of these guidelines
For the purposes of law enforcement and national security, the exchange of data takes place usually between the authorities involved, so Article 48 is not applicable
For example, when it comes to cooperation with law enforcement authorities of a third country, criminal procedural rules of the Member State
As regards international agreement concluded by the Union, see CJEU Judgment Case C-327/91, French Republic v Commission, para. 27.
